description: The content service's collections and their display metadata. collection -> schema is many-to-one; all five currently use the shared 'entry' schema. Split a collection onto its own schema when it grows type-specific fields (e.g. recipes gaining structured ingredients).

collections.name: media
collections.title: Media
collections.description: Image metadata records — one per blob. Bodies reference an image as ![](blob://<cid>).

collections.name: series
collections.title: Series
collections.description: Galleries — ordered groups of media extracted from runs of consecutive inline embeds. Bodies reference a series as ![](series://<rkey>).
